feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service for Partner Creation Approval Process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while configuring the business partner creation approval live process. I am following the official configuration guide and am facing a challenge at the step where I need to enrich the base data using the My Inbox app.

Problem Description: After updating the data in My Inbox and attempting to submit it, the system sends a POST request to the following URL:

https://***process-automation.build.cloud.sap/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmrulesruntime/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services

Although the request returns a status 200 (indicating that it has technically succeeded), the resulting data array is unexpectedly empty (Result: []). Here is the snippet of the code handling the response:

Questions:

1. Has anyone else experienced a similar issue with the My Inbox app in process automation environments?
2. Are there any known fixes or workarounds that can ensure the result array is not empty?

I appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this. Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Workflow Management - OData response headers
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are building few workflows in SAP Build Process Automation Pro-code approach.

In that we are calling OData Services in Service Task, which returns Response header to a POST calls in sap-message. But from Service Task we are able to read only response body and not the response headers returned from OData POST service like Success Message like "Sales order is created with ABCD number" etc.

Please suggest any option to handle this requirement.

 

Regards,

Satya

* Note - Re-posting same question in Technology Q&A

entry.title: SBPA - How to handle Intermediate Message Event requirement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few requirement/scenario to implement using Intermediate Message event in workflow, earlier we  had implement using workflows(Workflow Management).

Now we thought of implementing using complete workflow requirement in Process automation using Business processes, but we don't see Intermediate message event options.

Example scenario : In-between Business Process execution need to wait until get information received from external system (Non - SAP Applications).

Please suggest how to handle this requirements.

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: Change field in Form SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Can I use the Forms in SAP Build Process Automation not only to approve but also change and add values?

The new value would be the output of the form.

Or is there any other function for that?

Basically, I want to give the user a chance to change the value, e.g. of the amount.

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform 

I guess its an easy one for you @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: how to merge two process of data in one line item in approval step of sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are implementing build process automation using a sub process mechanism ( calling sub process in main process ). on executions of main process we are getting two line items in approval inbox. 

Is it possible to merge two line item of approval inbox into one line item.

Could you please suggest or help on this how we can achieve it.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Dynamic URL's in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am trying to achieve back to back API calls in SAP Build process automation but using only actions and not using the bot for web service calls in a sequence.

Here's the scenario:

1. The process starts with SBPA form, where the user enters the asset details.

2. The details have to be filled in a word template file and saved as a PDF on SharePoint online.

To achieve this , I am using "Adobe Document Generation API" https://developer.adobe.com/document-services/docs/apis/ which works  perfectly fine with the automation but since having an automation bot for a single small use case is not so cost effective. I would like to do the same using only the Build Process Automation process.

This process involves calling back to back API's. In one of the steps, I get the upload url from one of the "GET" calls and then I need to make a "PUT" to this received url . In this case the endpoint URL is not fixed and hence I am unable to proceed.

Using Automation artifact, it works as follows:

 

In case of automation , my script does the job and then call webservice

return {
  method: 'PUT',
  url: UploadUri.uploadUri,<<<<<<<(URL received from the previous "GET" call)
  responseType: 'json',
  resolveBodyOnly: false,
  headers:
  {
    'Content-Type': 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'
  },
  readFileAsBufferToBody: filePath
};
 

Additional Info:

The url looks like : 

https://dcplatformstorageservice-prod-us-east-1.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/5fae1934bd694b2997d675ed...
We need to make a "PUT" call to this URL which is generated dynamically as an upload pre-signed url in the previous steps to upload our document to this asset location.
It would be great if you could point me in the right direction so that we achieve this with SBPA process only without using automation . Basically, if there is a possibility to pass the call as dynamic URL from SBPA process.
 
@Dan_Wroblewski 
@Archana 
@Priya 
Best Regards,
Geet

entry.title: The deployed project is not reflecting in Agent
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

After deploying the project, it's not reflecting in the bot agent. But the Project is seen in environment. Even after restarting the agent, deployed project is not reflecting.

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Unable to change the flow line in BTP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

  I was trying to create a project to explore SAP BTP Build Process Automation , but I am stuck with a issue ,

I am unable to change the flow to auto approval notification to the end.

 

Is there any restriction in the trial account? I am not sure why I am unable to map the flow as required. Please help me in this regard.

Thank you

entry.title: Dynamic Approver based on dynamic task determination.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are looking forward to implement SAP Build Process Automation.

We want to trigger the SBPA using event based trigger perhaps not clear about handling the dynamic flow of tasks and approvers. As a tasks can have any number of task level and each level will have a dynamic approver . 

Please help me in implementing this using Build Automation . Do i need to use CAPM application to get the tasks and approvers details or can i handle it using business rules if so then how it can be achieved using business rules and actions. Please advise.

entry.title: Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) s_displayDocumentLineItem1 to appear (30 s)."
entry.content:
My BPA flow works fine, but it keeps getting stuck at the same step every time I run it again after a few hours, even though I've defined conditions to ensure it's uniquely Identified.

 

SAP Business Workflow SAP Business Application Studio SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation -Unable to add Attended Trigger
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are working on BTP Trial version for SAP Build Process Automation offering. We have downloaded SAP Build Process Automation desktop agent and deployed a project to our environment. We don't have desktop Studio installed. Now , when we attempt to add an attended  trigger to our project , we are unable to see our project in drop down and we see a prompt -You can only create an attended trigger for projects with automations and a project launcher. Please refer screen shot for details.

 

Could you please let us know , how can we navigate through the issue ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Amit Kulkarni

entry.title: Configure SAP BTP destination REST API integration - Document information extraction - "AxiosError:
entry.content:
In SAP Build App - I am getting below error -

"stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500\n

I am using BTP destination- OAuth2Client authentication-

but test call is failing - AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500

This same call is successfull though POSTMAN.

entry.title: How to navigate with multiple values of parameters in intent based navigation from UI component card
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Can you please help us in navigation to standard fiori app ( list of incomplete sales orders) where we need to pass multiple sales order while navigating. 
We are using ui component card with intent based navigation. 
Any code to pass multiple values in parameters is appreciated

entry.title: SAP build action - 403 error for POST API call with CSRF enabled
entry.content:
I'm trying to upload attachment in SAP using API with SAP build process automation and action.

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is the standard API used to upload attachment for WO. I tried to configure it in Actions but it result in 403 error for POST api call with CSRF enabled. So I tried to get token with GET call first and then used the same token in POST call as static value which works fine as well.

I'm not sure why POST api call throw 403 error with CSRF enabled...

entry.title: Switch off 'SSL certificate verification' setting in BPA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have one automation which is getting data from SuccessFactors system. This works well from one network, but from other network, we get the issue

"unable to get local issuer certificate"

Same issue happens with Postman also, but there we have option to switch off SSL Verfication.

From chrome or edge if we access the same query, we get the data(maybe internally it switched off SSL Verfication)

Could you please help me what to do so that i dont get this error in  running automation. Or how can i switch this verification off, like we can do in Postman

entry.title: Print Array in email, Fiori application - (webcontent) SAP BUILD automation, not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I downloaded a project from SAP BUILD store, and it contains WebContent (html files) which triggered from workflow. I need to print table (array) in email.

In html file, I am able to print  ${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode} but not able to print complete table by using <script>  </script> for table array $.context.assetDetails.assetItem. Code shown below.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

<table id="assetTable">
        <tr>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CostCente</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Capitalization Date</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">**bleep**. Acquis. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Accum. Dep. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Net Book Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Transfer</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Amount Posted</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Class</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Cost Center</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Status</td>
        </tr>
    </table>
        <tr></tr>
        <script>
            populateTable();
            function populateTable() {
                const table = document.getElementById("assetTable");
                var assetItem = [];
                assetItem = $.context.assetDetails.assetItem;
                assetItem.forEach(item => {
                    const row = table.insertRow(-1); // Inserts a row at the end of the table
                    Object.values(item).forEach(value => {
                        const cell = row.insertCell(-1); // Inserts a cell at the end of the row
                        cell.textContent = value; // Sets the text content of the cell
                    });
                });
            }
        </script>
        <tr></tr>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetdescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].accumulateddepreciationvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].netbookvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].transferPercent}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].amountposted}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetSubNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumberDescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetClass}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetStatus}</td>        

    <pre>${context.internal.successMsg}</pre>
    <pre>${context.internal.errorMsg}</pre>

    <br><br>
    <p>Thank You.</p>

entry.title: Dealy in updating custom values for Visibility Scenario SAP BUILD AUTOMATION
entry.content:
Hi

I downloaded the “Fixed Asset Transfer Approval Management” project from the BUILD project.  The visibility dashboard “com.sap.content.Fixed_Assets_Transfer_Approval” was also downloaded along with this project. I added a new custom attribute “InventoryField” and “InventoryField” for this visibility scenario.

 

On the first day, the values were not populating in the newly added field. I thought that either the value was not present or there is some issue in coding. After many many tries, the value never populated.

 

On 2ND day, when I ran the scenario, the value populated.   After that, I changed the mapping to a new value but the system still showed the old mapping value.   It seems there is a delay in updating values for newly added attributes.

 

Let me know if I am missing anything, these are the steps I performed after each code deployment.  I know many of them are not necessary each time I change code but still, I performed all these steps with the hope that it will update the value in Visibility scenario

 

  1. Business Application studio :
    1. BUILD Project
    2. Then DEPLOY project
  2. Cloud Foundry SUBACCOUNT:
    1. Refresh HTML5 Applications
  3. SAP BUILD:
    1. Go to Lobby a Visibility scenario -- Process -- Reimport Template again and Activate
    2. Go to MonitoringàVisibility Scenario --Process data again (Though we have job after every 5 minutes)
  4. SAP BUILD WORKZONE
    1. Go to Content Channel and click on “Update Content.”

entry.title: Am trying to run 4G5 Sales order process automation and getting the error
entry.content:
Hello Team, Am trying to run 4G5 Sales order process automation and getting the error unable to retrieve information from factory. Please help. Thanks

Thanks

Srini

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Error:
entry.content:
Hi All,

I was trying to print the failed element name error in excel 

 

I have used "error.message" for getting the error but instead i am getting the following error:

can someone guide me on this?

@Chaitanya_Priya 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP BUILD Process Deploy Error
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I am deploying the process I am getting form error issue. So I tried to deploy the process one by one after adding each form but sometime it is getting deployed and sometime giving the same error:-

 Please someone guide on this.
